title: Job Opening Teacher at IDP Education India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at IDP Education India
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Teacher in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!
